response.global_analysis: The audio features an English spoken intro followed by a performance of 'This game' by Suzuki Konomi. The lyrics phonetically match the Reference JSON and the on-screen title card. I have synchronized the subtitles to the vocal audio, respecting pauses and splitting long phrases for readability. Ghost subtitles are maintained during the long instrumental intro and solo sections. The translation is context-aware, specifically referencing 'Blank' (Kuuhaku) as a key theme of the song's origin.

subtitles.original: Wait, is that how I get out?
subtitles.english: Wait, is that how I get out?

subtitles.original: Okay... Okay, I got it then!
subtitles.english: Okay... Okay, I got it then!

subtitles.original: I'm gonna sing and dance a song right now!
subtitles.english: I'm gonna sing and dance a song right now!

subtitles.original: Here we go!
subtitles.english: Here we go!

subtitles.original: This game!
subtitles.english: This game!

subtitles.original: まわり続ける 歯車にはなり下がらない
subtitles.english: I won't settle for being a gear that just keeps spinning

subtitles.original: 平均演じる 誕生から始まった地獄
subtitles.english: Playing it safe, a hell that started from birth

subtitles.original: 遊び半分で 神が導いた 盤上の世界
subtitles.english: A game for fun, a board-game world guided by gods

subtitles.original: No no no game no life
subtitles.english: No no no game no life

subtitles.original: ぬるい平穏を ばっさり切り捨てて
subtitles.english: Cutting away this lukewarm peace

subtitles.original: 栄光の階段に 存在刻むんだ
subtitles.english: Carving my existence into the stairs of glory

subtitles.original: 目に映るのは 完全勝利の運命
subtitles.english: What I see is the fate of complete victory

subtitles.original: 何もかも 計算通り 変えてやる
subtitles.english: I'll change everything exactly as planned

subtitles.original: 止まらない空白で
subtitles.english: With an unstoppable blank space

subtitles.original: We are Maverick
subtitles.english: We are Maverick

subtitles.original: 救済なんていらない
subtitles.english: I don't need any salvation

subtitles.original: どんな理不尽も 覆せばいいだけ
subtitles.english: I just have to overturn any absurdity

subtitles.original: の話
subtitles.english: That's all there is to it

subtitles.original: 才能の駆け引きと
subtitles.english: A strategic battle of wits

subtitles.original: 才能が 無敗誘う
subtitles.english: And talent invites invincibility

subtitles.original: 生まれ落ちた日の手で 楽しむんだ
subtitles.english: I'll enjoy it with the hands I was born with

subtitles.original: 自分だけを 自分 信じてる
subtitles.english: I believe in myself, only myself

subtitles.original: 底に潜む 闇より強い相手はいない
subtitles.english: There's no opponent stronger than the darkness lurking at the bottom

subtitles.original: 挫けぬ限り そこに敗北はあり得ない
subtitles.english: As long as I don't falter, defeat is impossible

subtitles.original: 表向きの個性に 安住と引き換えに
subtitles.english: In exchange for settling for a superficial identity

subtitles.original: プライド殺すな
subtitles.english: Don't kill your pride

subtitles.original: No no no sense of life
subtitles.english: No no no sense of life

subtitles.original: 野蛮な雑音を きっぱり蹴飛ばして
subtitles.english: Kicking away the savage noise

subtitles.original: 誰より純粋な 声上げるんだ
subtitles.english: I'll raise a voice purer than anyone's

subtitles.original: 戦うことは きっと間違いじゃない
subtitles.english: Fighting is surely not a mistake

subtitles.original: 手応えが 教えてくれた
subtitles.english: The feeling of it told me so

subtitles.original: 全て失っても 勝ち残れ
subtitles.english: Even if I lose everything, I will survive

subtitles.original: We are Maverick
subtitles.english: We are Maverick

subtitles.original: 常識なんていらない
subtitles.english: I don't need any common sense

subtitles.original: 前ならえ向かう 先に待ってるのは
subtitles.english: What's waiting ahead of following the lead

subtitles.original: 退屈な王座に
subtitles.english: On a boring throne...

subtitles.original: いなけりゃつまらない
subtitles.english: It's boring if I'm not there

subtitles.original: 挑んでやる
subtitles.english: I'll take the challenge

subtitles.original: 生まれ落ちた命も 駒にして
subtitles.english: Making even the life I was born with into a piece

subtitles.original: 自分だけの道を 最後まで
subtitles.english: Running my own path until the very end

subtitles.original: 迷わない 選ばれし者の 真っ赤な自惚れでも
subtitles.english: I won't hesitate, even if it's the sheer conceit of the chosen

subtitles.original: 誇らしく 生き抜くための 方法を一つしか知らないから
subtitles.english: Because I only know one way to live proudly

subtitles.original: We are Maverick
subtitles.english: We are Maverick

subtitles.original: 救済なんていらない
subtitles.english: I don't need any salvation

subtitles.original: どんな理不尽も 覆せばいいだけ
subtitles.english: I just have to overturn any absurdity

subtitles.original: の話
subtitles.english: That's all there is to it

subtitles.original: 才能の駆け引きと
subtitles.english: A strategic battle of wits

subtitles.original: 才能が 無敗誘う
subtitles.english: And talent invites invincibility

subtitles.original: 生まれ落ちた日の手で 楽しむんだ
subtitles.english: I'll enjoy it with the hands I was born with

subtitles.original: この世界手にして 笑うんだ
subtitles.english: I'll take this world in my hands and laugh

subtitles.original: We are Maverick
subtitles.english: We are Maverick

subtitles.original: 最強の空白
subtitles.english: The strongest blank

subtitles.original: 空白ならば 何物にも 何物にもなれる
subtitles.english: If we're blank, we can become anything, anything

subtitles.original: 自分だけを 自分 信じてる
subtitles.english: I believe in myself, only myself
